tagline: the room that engineers the loop, then runs it

task.title: Fix off-by-one in pagination offset
task.description: last page drops one row; pure function, no side effects

checks.name: compiles
checks.why: the code has to at least build before anything else matters

checks.name: unit-tests
checks.why: behavior is pinned by tests, not vibes

checks.name: repro-test
checks.why: a test that fails on the bug and passes on the fix — otherwise we never proved we fixed it

loop.exit_condition: all required checks pass AND no critic still objects
rationale: task kind is 'bugfix', so the loop centers on a reproduction test as the real exit gate

transcript.text: New task: Fix off-by-one in pagination offset — last page drops one row; pure function, no side effects

Proposed a loop for 'Fix off-by-one in pagination offset'. Required gates: compiles, unit-tests, repro-test. Critics: @RivalReviewer. Human gate: none. @LoopCritic — try to poke holes in this exit condition before we build.

Loop holds up — exit condition is not gameable. Approved.
@LoopRunner — run this loop. Exit: all required checks pass AND no critic still objects. Human gate: none.

exit condition not met — looping again:
  • repro-test failing — a test that fails on the bug and passes on the fix — otherwise we never proved we fixed it
  • @RivalReviewer (adversarial correctness) wants another pass
revision 1: drafted a change addressing 2 defect(s)
loop complete: 1 revision(s), gate [n/a], status shipped. shipping code + the loop that produced it.

transcript.text: New task: Add SSO token refresh to the login flow — rotate refresh tokens; touches auth and sessions

Proposed a loop for 'Add SSO token refresh to the login flow'. Required gates: compiles, unit-tests, acceptance-test. Critics: @RivalReviewer. Human gate: TechLead. @LoopCritic — try to poke holes in this exit condition before we build.
➕ recruited @SecurityCritic into the room on demand (security) — band_add_participant
joined as the security critic — voting on every revision from here.

exit condition not met — looping again:
  • acceptance-test failing — the new behavior is demonstrated end to end
  • @RivalReviewer (adversarial correctness) wants another pass
  • @SecurityCritic (security) wants another pass
revision 1: drafted a change addressing 3 defect(s)
⛔ ESCALATION — awaiting @TechLead: High-stakes loop for 'Add SSO token refresh to the login flow' converged after 1 revision(s). Reply APPROVE to ship or REJECT to hold.
APPROVE — reviewed the diff and the loop, ship it.
loop complete: 1 revision(s), gate [TechLead: approved], status shipped. shipping code + the loop that produced it.
